allegation: Fail to provide driver details, contrary to section 172(2) of the Road Traffic Act 1988

cpsChase.label: Notice / requirement to identify driver
cpsChase.draft: Please provide Notice / requirement to identify driver or confirm in writing why it is not available.

courtLine: The defence asks the court to record that the s172 notice/requirement to identify the driver, keeper position, and service/nomination records require confirmation before the defence position on driver identification is fixed.
clientSummaryPreview:
CLIENT-SAFE SUMMARY
(not for court or CPS)

We are reviewing the papers in your case (Ella Shaw). This is early-stage — nothing is final until we have full disclosure and your instructions. The live issue is the s172 notice/requirement to identify the driver: service/posting proof, keeper/DVLA position, nomination/response, and the SJP procedure bundle. Device calibration, intoxilyser, or CCTV/dashcam material on the papers is secondary and not the lead for driver-identification.

[CaseBrain — client-safe summary. Evidence state: provisional. Not for court or CPS use.]
doNotOverstate: Do not treat device summary as proof of reliability
Do not treat procedure summary alone as proof of device reliability or identity.

proofReceipts.outputLine: The defence asks the court to record that the s172 notice/requirement to identify the driver, keeper position, and service/nomination records require confirmation before the defence position on driver identification is fixed.
